description: Rich, creamy cheese dip made with high-quality ingredients and formulated to fit a keto or low-carb lifestyle. Use it as a dip for veggies, a sauce for meats, or a topping for keto dishes.
Thori khatti, thori meethi. A tangy-sweet chatni that adds a twist to your iftar without the sugar.
Sesame-topped almond flour loaf with a soft crumb. Keeps five days refrigerated.
Soft keto roti made with almond and coconut flour. Rolls and folds like the real thing.
Two soft burger buns made with almond and coconut flour.
Thin almond-flour base loaded with mozzarella, chicken and jalapenos. Baked to order.
Grilled chicken in a cream sauce over zucchini noodles.
Almond and vanilla ice cream sweetened with erythritol. No added sugar.
Dark chocolate brownie sweetened with erythritol. No added sugar.
Raw unfiltered apple cider vinegar with the mother. A keto kitchen staple.
Crunchy baked crackers made from aged cheddar and almond flour.
